heading: Adoption of voluntary guidance by Commission
label: 21101 Adoption of voluntary guidance by Commission
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 15501 of Title 42

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: To assist States in meeting the requirements of part A of this subchapter, the Commission shall adopt voluntary guidance consistent with such requirements in accordance with the procedures described in .section 21102 of this title
in the case of the recommendations with respect to , ;section 21081 of this titleJanuary 1, 2004
in the case of the recommendations with respect to , ; andsection 21082 of this titleOctober 1, 2003
in the case of the recommendations with respect to , .section 21083 of this titleOctober 1, 2003

children.heading: Quadrennial update
children.label: c Quadrennial update
children.text: The Commission shall review and update recommendations adopted with respect to no less frequently than once every 4 years.section 21081 of this title
